channel.title: Hi-Lo Liquor Market — Culver City Events
channel.description: Upcoming tastings, pop-ups, and events at Hi-Lo Liquor Market (Culver City).

item.title: Free Tasting: Lo Siento Tequila
item.description:
When: Jul 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Lo Siento tequilas are sustainably farmed in the Jalisco Highlands using 100% Blue Weber Agave that is grown and distilled by family owned and operated distillery. Come try their tequilas as they resonate with both novices and experience tequila drinkers alike!

item.title: Free Tasting: Nosotros Tequila & Mezcal
item.description:
When: Jul 18 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Nosotros is a small-batch agave spirits brand that marries the Pura Vida lifestyle of Costa Rica with the rebel spirit of Mexico, blending them under the California sun. Come on in and try this independent brand's award-winning Blanco, Reposado, and Mezcal!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Slang Burgers
item.description:
When: Jul 17 5:00 PM - 8:30 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us at our Culver City location for smash burgers by our friends, Slang Burgers! Come early, they sell fast!

item.title: Free Tasting: Little Sun Calimocho RTDs!
item.description:
When: Jul 17 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Complimentary tasting with Little Sun Calimocho RTDs!

item.title: Free Tasting: Perro Verde Mezcal
item.description:
When: Jul 16 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Perro Verde Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: January Spirits + Rejon Tequila & Reposado
item.description:
When: Jul 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Complimentary tasting with January Spirits + Rejon Tequila & Reposado!

item.title: Free Tasting: Jumbo Time Wines
item.description:
When: Jul 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Enjoy a complimentary tasting with Jumbo Time Wines!

item.title: Free Tasting: Hinterhaus Distilling + Lost Republic Whiskey
item.description:
When: Jul 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Free Tasting with Hinterhaus Distilling!

item.title: Free Tasting: Slowdays Gin
item.description:
When: Jul 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Slowdays gin!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: SoLA PoBoys
item.description:
When: Jul 9 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come on by to enjoy SoLA PoBoys!!

item.title: Free Tasting: Yuzy Margaritas
item.description:
When: Jun 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Yuzy Margaritas

item.title: Free Tasting: LA Sin Hielo Whiskey
item.description:
When: Jun 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a complimentary with Sin Hielo Whiskey! Made here in LA!

item.title: Culver City: Matcha Bear Pop-up!
item.description:
When: Jun 27 10:30 AM - 1:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Matcha Bear is popping up this Saturday! Come by to try their delicious matcha drinks to kick off your Saturday!

item.title: Free Tasting: Fall Brewing
item.description:
When: Jun 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Fall Brewing.

item.title: Free Tasting: Meet the Distiller of Lost Republic Whiskey
item.description:
When: Jun 26 4:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with lost republic and meet the distiller!

item.title: Free Tasting: Yebiga Rakija
item.description:
When: Jun 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample this unique and delicious Serbian Plum Brandy. Yebiga Rakija is an exceptional , handcrafted and 100% natural Sljivovica, a fruit brandy from central central Serbia.

item.title: Free Tasting: Salt Point Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Jun 25 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come kick back and raise a can with Salt Point premium canned cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: Wismettac Sake and Shochu
item.description:
When: Jun 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Wismettac Sake and Shochu!

item.title: Free Tasting: Anytime Spritz + Farmhouse Organic Spirits
item.description:
When: Jun 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Anytime Spritz makes organic and regenerative spirits & cocktails. Crafted by queer women, powered by farmers and the first climate negative distillery.

item.title: Free Tasting: Golden Eagle Vodka
item.description:
When: Jun 18 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of Golden Eagle Vodka!

item.title: Free Tasting: BTL SVC
item.description:
When: Jun 17 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

BTL SVC provides award-winning, hand-crafted, premium cocktails, conveniently served anytime and anywhere.

item.title: Free Tasting: Golden Eagle Vodka
item.description:
When: Jun 12 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of Golden Eagle Vodka!

item.title: Free Tasting: Iris Vodka Spritz
item.description:
When: Jun 6 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Iris Spirits!

item.title: Free Tasting: Nosotros Tequila & Mezcal
item.description:
When: Jun 6 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Nosotros is a small-batch agave spirits brand that marries the Pura Vida lifestyle of Costa Rica with the rebel spirit of Mexico, blending them under the California sun. Come on in and try this independent brand's award-winning Blanco, Reposado, and Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Veranda Craft Cocktails
item.description:
When: Jun 5 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Veranda canned cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: Kin A Peel Liqueur
item.description:
When: Jun 4 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come try this deliciously whimsical entry into the liqueur world. KIN A-Peel Banana Liqueur is an irresistible fusion of our white whiskey with lusciously over-ripe bananas. Crafted to perfection, this banana liqueur promises an A-Peeling experience for both your cocktail creations and culinary adventures.

item.title: Free Tasting: Suncliffe Gin
item.description:
When: Jun 4 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come join us for a free tasting of this aromatic gin made with juniper berries from the twisted trees of Sedona, AZ.

item.title: Free Tasting: Moth RTD
item.description:
When: Jun 3 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample this latest entry into the RTD market all the way from London, England! Designed for wherever your day takes you, from trackies to tuxedoes, these small but mighty cocktails are crafted with the finest spirits and 100% real ingredients. What's your pleasure guv?

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Slang Burgers
item.description:
When: May 29 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us at our Culver City location for smash burgers by our friends, Slang Burgers! Come early, they sell fast!

item.title: Free Tasting: Planet Wine
item.description:
When: May 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Planet Wine they'll be pouring the Tinto Amorio wines.

item.title: Free Tasting: Off Hours Bourbon & Rye
item.description:
When: May 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Off Hours Bourbon & Rye!

item.title: Food Pop-up: Camello Pita Poblano
item.description:
When: May 22 5:00 PM - 9:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Camello returns to Culver City with its delicious fusion of Mexican and Middle Eastern.

item.title: Free Tasting: Mommenpop Aperitif
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Mommenpop Aperitif!

item.title: Free Tasting: Kind Earth Vodka
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of this delightful vodka.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tesoro Azul Tequila
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of this delicious tequila.

item.title: Free Tasting: Slowdays Gin
item.description:
When: May 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Slowdays gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: Scotti's Original Springs Bourbon
item.description:
When: May 16 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come enjoy a free tasting of this recently re-established classic bourbon. California distilled – using locally sourced California-grown purple barley, rye, and corn – this bourbon is aged 3 years for a high-quality, smooth drink.

item.title: Food Pop-up: Camello Pita Poblano
item.description:
When: May 15 5:00 PM - 9:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Camello returns to Culver City with its delicious fusion of Mexican and Middle Eastern.

item.title: Free Tasting: Dizzy Donkey Tequila
item.description:
When: May 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Dizzy Donkey tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Golden Eagle Vodka
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of Golden Eagle Vodka!

item.title: Free Tasting: Pinhook Bourbon & Rye
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a tasting with Pinhook Kentucky straight bourbon whiskey.

item.title: Free Tasting: Zubrowka Vodka + LAIE Vermouth
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Tim from JVS Imports will be sampling out Polish Zubrowka Bison Grass Vodka and the Spanish LAIE Red Vermouth!

item.title: Good Buds Flower Pop-Up
item.description:
When: May 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Treat your mom by stopping by to pick up a bouquet and wine! 💐 🍷

item.title: Free Tasting: Raicilla De Una
item.description:
When: May 10 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Raicilla is an agave spirit steeped in folklore and tradition. With over 400 years of history, it’s considered the grandfather of tequila, the great-grandfather of mezcal, and the purest expression of Mexico’s agave spirits.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tip Top Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: May 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Tip Top canned cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: El Mero Mero Mezcal and El Pintor Tequila
item.description:
When: May 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with El Mero Mero Mezcal and El Pintor tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Nosotros Tequila & Mezcal
item.description:
When: May 2 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Nosotros is a small-batch agave spirits brand that marries the Pura Vida lifestyle of Costa Rica with the rebel spirit of Mexico, blending them under the California sun. Come on in and try this independent brand's award-winning Blanco, Reposado, and Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Madre Mezcal & Tequila
item.description:
When: May 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Madre Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Banhez Mezcal, Libelula Tequila & Combier Liqueur
item.description:
When: Apr 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

In the lead up to Cinco de Mayo, come sample three amazing products that will elevate your celebrations…plus free cocktail cards and Libelula cocktail shakers will be handed out.

item.title: Free Tasting: Saltire Scotch
item.description:
When: Apr 29 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come meet the global ambassador for Saltire Rare Malts and sample their incredible lineup of Scotches. There will also be small bite pairings to be sampled during the tasting.

item.title: Free Tasting: La Bodega Tequila
item.description:
When: Apr 25 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample this unpretentious "tequila for the people."

item.title: Free Tasting: Madwoman Espresso Martini
item.description:
When: Apr 25 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of a delightful new entry in the world of espresso martinis!

item.title: Free Tasting: Lost Republic Whiskey + OVO Vodka + Bottle Logic
item.description:
When: Apr 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a complimentary tasting of OVO Vodka, Lost Republic whiskey & Bottle Logic beers!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Branch Patty
item.description:
When: Apr 12 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Branch Patty makes handcrafted Jamaican Patties and Coco Bread. They started in Brooklyn and now they're made in LA! They pair perfectly with wine and beer!

item.title: Free Tasting: Suncliffe Gin
item.description:
When: Apr 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come join us for a free tasting of this aromatic gin made with juniper berries from the twisted trees of Sedona, AZ.

item.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
item.description:
When: Apr 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Morro Mezcal crafts their small batch artisanal spirits using time-honored methods and traditions of mezcal production, using mature single origin agaves, an earthen hardwood-fueled oven, open air wooden fermentation vessels and small wood-fired copper still distillation. Their mezcals are distilled to proof using agaves grown in the mountains of El Gramal in Oaxaca giving depth, character and complexity.

item.title: Free Tasting: Abre Ojos Tequila
item.description:
When: Apr 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of Abre Ojos tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Domaine Zafeirakis Wines
item.description:
When: Apr 9 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of these incredible organic wines from 4th generation Greek wine maker Christos Zafeirakis.

item.title: Free Tasting: Duvel Beer
item.description:
When: Apr 8 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Duvel, the iconic Belgian Golden Ale.

item.title: Free Tasting: Amante 1530
item.description:
When: Apr 4 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Hailing from the historic Il Palagio 1530 estate in Tuscany, this latest innovation in amaro offers a new take on an old classic; combining aromas of Italian citrus, ginger and honeysuckle to help you enjoy a unique bittersweet taste and a thoroughly delicious afternoon.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tequio Tequila
item.description:
When: Apr 3 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Tequio Tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: BTL SVC
item.description:
When: Apr 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

BTL SVC provides award-winning, hand-crafted, premium cocktails, conveniently served anytime and anywhere.

item.title: Free Tasting: Mama Chuy Gin
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample this refreshing Mexican gin. Distilled in small batches at the Satvrnal Distillery under Master Distiller Pedro Andres from a pristine base spirit produced by clean, swift fermentation and precise distillation. Vibrant lime zest greets the nose, with soft herbal bay leaf and classic juniper weaving a harmonious botanical tapestry; a crescendo of citrus brightens the palate before a light, coriander-driven spice on the finish.

item.title: Free Tasting: Granalta Blanco Tequila, Mezcal & Rum
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample these incredible tequilas & mezcal from Granalta. Made in San Dioniso Ocotepec, Oaxaca by Miguel Martinez, these artisanal expressions are roasted with mesquite & oak, milled by Tahona, fermented in cypress wood & twice distilled in a copper pot still.

item.title: Free Tasting: Harland Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Carl from Harland Brewing in San Diego, California will be tasting beers to customers in store!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
item.description:
When: Mar 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

item.title: Free Tasting: Slowdays Gin
item.description:
When: Mar 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Slowdays gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: Serendipity Wines
item.description:
When: Mar 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of some European natural wines! We'll be tasting a wine from Italy, France, and Austria!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Ronin Barbeque LA
item.description:
When: Mar 20 5:30 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Culver City

First appearance by a new BBQ provider; come enjoy the mouth water flavors Ronin has cooked up!

item.title: Free Tasting: Acronimo Sotol & Gin
item.description:
When: Mar 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Acronimo Sotol & Gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: Off Hours Bourbon & Rye
item.description:
When: Mar 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Off Hours Bourbon & Rye!

item.title: Free Tasting: Lodestar Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Lodestar whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Busker Irish Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Busker Irish Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bordiga Vermouth and Spirits
item.description:
When: Mar 12 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Bordiga Vermouth + Spirits!

item.title: Free Tasting: Ysidro Sake Spritz
item.description:
When: Mar 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come enjoy a free taste of this sophisticated spritz made with super premium sake and real, organic grapefruit & sea salt.

item.title: Free Tasting: Two Stacks Irish Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Two Stacks Irish Whiskey. We'll be sampling out their Dram in Can RTD's!

item.title: Free Tasting: AgaveLuz Tequila
item.description:
When: Mar 7 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting of AgaveLuz, and celebrate women's history month with female owned organic tequila.

item.title: Free Tasting: Perro Verde Mezcal
item.description:
When: Mar 6 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Perro Verde Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Penelope Whiskey and Yellowstone Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 6 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Penelope and Yellowstone whiskeys.

item.title: Free Tasting: Kolfok Wines
item.description:
When: Mar 6 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

We'll be sampling through 3 wines by Kolfolk. Winemaker, Stefan Wellanschitz is a natura wine maker in Austria in the Ödenburger Valley. He wants to avoid monoculture and prefers the grapes grow naturally together and whatever else might sprout up in between such as flowers and herbs. These wine are super fun and delicious!

item.title: Free Tasting: Wolf Spirits
item.description:
When: Mar 5 5:00 PM - 7:30 PM

Where: Culver City

Jef from Wolf Spirits will be sampling Granalta Mezcal and Rum along with Mama Chuy.

item.title: Free Tasting: Via Carota Cocktails
item.description:
When: Feb 28 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a Free Tasting with Via Carota Craft Cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: Kings County Whiskey
item.description:
When: Feb 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with the legendary NY whiskey, Kings County!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sake High
item.description:
When: Feb 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Sake High! is premium junmai sake brewed in Kyoto, Japan using classic techniques and local ingredients. Come by and try the refreshing sake, which comes in single cans and bottles.

item.title: Free Tasting: Lost Republic Bourbon & Rye
item.description:
When: Feb 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Lost Republic Distilling Co. was created by two best friends who had a vision of creating and delivering California's highest quality craft whiskey. Their Master Distiller has a keen attention to detail during the blending process, giving their whiskey flavor complexity and depth. Come try their small batch American whiskey produced right here in the heart of Sonoma.

item.title: Free Tasting: Bottle Logic Brewing
item.description:
When: Feb 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Bottle Logic Brewery!

item.title: Fiore Flower Pop-Up
item.description:
When: Feb 15 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM

Where: Culver City

We’ve got everything you need to make this Valentine’s extra special, including beautiful bouquets by Fiore!

item.title: Free Tasting: Mas Vino x Wonderwerk Wines
item.description:
When: Feb 14 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Get in the mood for love with a free tasting of fun wines from Wonderwerk & Mas Vino: Chismosa & Como La Flor!

item.title: Free Tasting: Livewire Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Feb 8 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM

Where: Culver City

LiveWire creates award-winning cocktails made by award-winning bartenders. The company's mission is to help further highlight the immensely talented bartenders that create brilliant drinks & nights, around the world. LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. Come check out this bold new brand with a free tasting of their exciting ready-to-drink canned cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: Nosotros Tequila & Mezcal
item.description:
When: Feb 8 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Nosotros is a small-batch agave spirits brand that marries the Pura Vida lifestyle of Costa Rica with the rebel spirit of Mexico, blending them under the California sun. Come on in and try this independent brand's award-winning Blanco, Reposado, and Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Ford's Gin & Negronis
item.description:
When: Feb 6 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Ford's Gin, "The Cocktail Gin." Complimentary samples of Ford's Gin negronis will also be on offer!

item.title: Free Tasting: Ghia N/A Spritz
item.description:
When: Feb 5 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a complimentary tasting of GHIA n/a spritz!

item.title: Free Tasting: Mario's Hard Espresso
item.description:
When: Jan 31 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Mario's Hard Espresso!

item.title: Food Pop Up: Shuck Brother's Oysters
item.description:
When: Jan 31 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for some oysters and good times! Shuck brothers will be serving freshly shucked oysters, Maine lobster rolls and Maine lobster rolls! YUUMMMM

item.title: Free Tasting: Nankai Shochu
item.description:
When: Jan 23 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come taste and learn about the wonderful world of shochu with these tasty spirits!

item.title: Store Closed – MERRY CHRISTMAS!
item.description:
When: Dec 25 12:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Where: Culver City

We'll be closed for Christmas Day but open again on December 26th at our normal hours. Enjoy your holiday!

item.title: Free Tasting: Simple Shots
item.description:
When: Dec 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample the spirit based juice shot. Simple ingredients, all natural, made with real fruit.

item.title: Free Tasting: Crown & Hops
item.description:
When: Dec 17 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Based out of Inglewood, CA, Crown and Hops is the first black-owned, woman-owned, and veteran-owned brewery. Owners Beny Ashburn and Teo Hunter have disrupted the space and built a brand whose core mission is to create culture equity in the beer industry. Come by, show your support and try some of their wonderful beers!

item.title: Off Hours Whiskey Takeover
item.description:
When: Dec 13 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a festive day of Off Hours whiskey at all locations with a curated experience, including: a complimentary festive drink and gifts with purchase. • Culver City: SMPL Artisan Cheesecakes will be popping-up with yummy, fresh cheesecakes • Long Beach: Slowlines Art will be popping-up • Costa Mesa: Made by Mabel Ceramics will be popping-up

item.title: Free Tasting: Domaine Casademont Wines
item.description:
When: Dec 12 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come experience some incredible French wines from a fresh and inventive young wine maker!

item.title: Holiday Sip & Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 6 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a festive day at all Locations 2-6PM. We've got complimentary tastings and local vendors lined up for a festive day of shopping! We're here to make gift giving season extra special!

item.title: Free Tasting: Craft Spirits Coop
item.description:
When: Nov 29 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a free tasting with Craft Spirits Coop lineup!

item.title: Free Tasting: Whiskey Del Bac
item.description:
When: Nov 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Join us for a complimentary tasting of Whiskey Del Bac!
